title: Glochidion dunnianum
taxonomy: Glochidion dunnianum is classified within the family Phyllanthaceae, which is a large family of flowering plants commonly known as the leaf-flower family. It belongs to the order Malpighiales and is native to China. The plant's classification is further specified at the genus level, where it is placed in the genus Glochidion. This genus is characterized by its unique combination of characteristics, such as small leaves and distinctive flowers. As part of the Euphorbiaceae clade, Glochidion dunnianum shares many evolutionary relationships with other plants in this clade.

The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory and digestive issues.
